notes: Completes the chanterelle identification and spore-print normalization pass across cinnabar, smooth, hardwood-yellow, conifer-yellow, yellowfoot, and the broad comparison record.
Replaces generic copied chanterelle profiles with record-specific underside, false-gill, flesh, staining, host, habitat, and spore-print fields.
Keeps yellowfoot on HOLD while strengthening its Michigan-relevant field profile; no image exposure or image-rights metadata changed.
